title: Table Heading and Sidebar Label Font Weight Styling
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want table headings and sidebar labels to have balanced typography, so that the interface doesn't feel visually heavy.
acceptance_criteria: Table headings use the sorting class with font-weight 600
Sorted column headings (asc/desc) maintain consistent styling
Sidebar labels use the sorting class instead of bold tags
Typography feels balanced without being too heavy
ux_changes: Custom sorting CSS class applied to table headings and sidebar labels for balanced, consistent typography. Bold tags replaced with the sorting class for lighter visual weight.
implementation_notes: Initial implementation missed the sorting_asc and sorting_desc classes, which were added in a follow-up.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the base sorting class. Ryan later requested adding sorting_asc and sorting_desc classes as well, which were quickly added.
